channel.title: Menopause Sleep & Night Sweats — Hush
channel.description: Menopause Sleep & Night Sweats — hormone-free menopause self-care pins from Hush.

item.title: Menopause Night Sweats at 2am? You're Not the Only One
item.description: Menopause night sweats waking you at 2am? You're in good company. Why perimenopause and menopause bring night sweats and warm, broken nights, in plain language. A calm, hormone-free look at midlife self care. #menopause #nightsweats #perimenopause #midlifewomen #hormonefree

item.title: How I Made Bedtime Feel Like Mine Again
item.description: Menopause sleep felt out of reach until I built a small evening ritual that's actually mine. A hormone-free berry chew I keep by the bed for midlife nights. #menopausesleep #hormonefree #perimenopause #midlifewellness

item.title: Menopause Night Sweats at 2am? Here's Why
item.description: Soaking the sheets at 2am, then lying awake - night sweats are one of the most common (and least-talked-about) parts of menopause. Our guide explains what's behind them and why you're not the only one awake. Save this and read it on the blog. #menopausenightsweats #menopausesleep #perimenopause
